nodes.title: 1. Jakkanna Motion + Appearance Authoring — import FBX here
Reference frame from the same motion batch
Jakkanna frame as Krea structural source
Review generated Krea reference and scene
ANIMATION MASKS — black driver / white reference
Shared Jakkanna prompt to SCAIL UMT5

widgets_values:
# Jakkanna + Krea 2 + SCAIL-2 Animate — Fast

This two-stage graph uses one Jakkanna Pose Studio node as the motion and prompt source.

1. Import a licensed Mixamo-compatible FBX into **Jakkanna Motion + Appearance Authoring**. The default **FIT_CLIP** mode samples the complete clip once into 81 frames and plays it at 16 fps. Choose **REALTIME** only when the source extends through 5.000 seconds.
2. Describe the finished character, clothing, action, scene, lighting, and fixed camera in the Jakkanna prompt.
3. Frame 0 enters Krea 2 to create the appearance reference; all 81 Jakkanna frames drive SCAIL-2 Animation Mode.
4. Review the driver, 16-bit reference, SAM 3.1 track, reference mask, and final video.

This Fast workflow uses the official six-step Lightx2v/Euler/simple topology for iteration. The lossless FFV1 master requires **ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite 1.7.9 or newer**. Required Krea 2, SCAIL-2, SAM 3.1, VAE, text-encoder, CLIP-Vision, and LoRA model files are selected in the loader nodes.
